features.title: Site Health Audit

features.title: Scheduled Recurring Audits

features.title: AEO — Answer Engine Optimization
features.oneLiner: 8 trust audit checks, healthcare schema types, AEO content rules, and recommendation engine for AI search visibility

features.oneLiner: AI-generated JSON-LD schemas with Google validation, CMS templates, diff view, and one-click Webflow publishing

features.title: SEO Editor + Bulk AI Rewrite
features.oneLiner: Edit titles/descriptions via Webflow API with AI suggestions, 3-variation bulk rewrites, and per-page client approval

features.title: Keyword Strategy Engine
features.oneLiner: AI-driven keyword mapping with SEMRush/DataForSEO data, content gaps, quick wins, and conversion-aware prioritization

features.title: Content Brief Generator
features.oneLiner: AI briefs with real SERP data, competitor analysis, audience personas, and 7 page-type templates

features.title: AI Content Post Generator
features.oneLiner: Full blog posts from briefs with Claude prose, GPT unification, brand voice scoring, and auto-publish to Webflow CMS

features.title: Client Portal
features.oneLiner: White-labeled dashboard with search data, health scores, strategy, content hub, approvals, and AI chatbot

features.title: AI Insights Engine (Client Chatbot)
features.oneLiner: GPT-4o advisor using full dashboard data — GSC, GA4, audit, strategy, ranks — with conversation memory and revenue hooks

features.title: Asset Manager + Image Compression
features.oneLiner: One-click image compression with CMS-aware re-upload — patches every Webflow collection item automatically, no broken images

features.title: Dead Link Checker
features.oneLiner: Crawls every page including CMS for 404s and broken links, with inline redirect creation and CSV export for Webflow import

features.title: PageSpeed / Core Web Vitals
features.oneLiner: Google PageSpeed Insights with CrUX field-data pass/fail — the actual ranking signal, not just a lab score

features.title: Redirect Manager + AI Recommendations
features.oneLiner: Scans for redirect chains, 404s, and GSC ghost URLs, then AI-recommends the best redirect target for each broken slug

features.title: Internal Linking Analyzer
features.oneLiner: Maps orphan pages and under-linked content with one-click HTML snippet copy — the highest-leverage SEO tactic automated

features.title: Content Decay Engine
features.oneLiner: Detects pages losing traffic month-over-month with severity tiers and AI-generated refresh recommendations

features.title: Page Intelligence
features.oneLiner: Unified per-page SEO hub showing keyword map, optimization score, AI recommendations, and content gaps with a 'Fix These First' priority queue

features.title: Site Architecture Planner
features.oneLiner: Combines live pages, planned matrix content, and strategy gaps into a visual URL tree with orphan detection and schema coverage overlay

features.title: LLMs.txt Generator
features.oneLiner: Generates llms.txt and llms-full.txt with AI summaries so ChatGPT, Perplexity, and other AI models understand your site accurately

features.title: Rank Tracker
features.oneLiner: Pin priority keywords and visualize position trends over time with sparklines and multi-keyword trend charts

features.title: Analytics Hub — Connected Intelligence Engine
features.oneLiner: Insight-first unified analytics merging GSC and GA4 with a priority-ranked feed that connects drops to strategy, pipeline, and audit data

features.title: Approval Workflow

features.title: Client Request System
features.oneLiner: Structured ticket system inside the client portal — clients submit requests with categories and files, agency responds with status updates

features.title: Content Matrices
features.oneLiner: Bulk content planning grids — define Service × City dimensions once and generate 50+ planned pages with keywords, URLs, and status tracking

features.title: Content Templates

features.oneLiner: Domain-level backlink dashboard with referring domains, follow/nofollow ratio, and top 15 linking sites from SEMRush

features.title: Automated Monthly Reports

features.title: Stripe Payments + Subscriptions

features.oneLiner: Dedicated Plans tab inside the client portal comparing tiers, showing content pricing, and driving upgrades with ROI-backed CTAs

features.title: Beta Feedback Widget

features.oneLiner: Clients approve or decline keywords from the Strategy tab — declined keywords are permanently excluded from future strategy generations

features.title: Client Strategy Participation

features.oneLiner: Expert analyst chat with 20+ live data sources — Analyst, Page Reviewer, and Content Reviewer modes with resizable docked or floating panel

features.title: Global Knowledge Base
features.oneLiner: Per-workspace business context that feeds every AI feature — chatbots, briefs, posts, and strategy all speak the client's language

features.title: Brand Voice Auto-Generation
features.oneLiner: One-click website crawl extracts brand voice guidelines from real writing patterns — AI content matches tone from day one

features.title: AI Recommendations Engine
features.oneLiner: Traffic-weighted, prioritized SEO recommendations auto-generated after every audit — each one links directly to the tool that can fix it

features.title: SEO Change Performance Tracker
features.oneLiner: Logs every title and meta change, then fetches 28-day before/after GSC data — concrete proof that SEO work drives clicks

features.title: Schema Impact Tracking
features.oneLiner: Correlates schema deployment dates with GSC before/after data — shows aggregate click and position deltas across all schema changes

features.title: Data Export (CSV/JSON)
features.oneLiner: Export briefs, keyword strategy, content requests, activity log, and matrices as CSV or JSON for client handoffs and reporting

features.oneLiner: Monthly reports and audit snapshots get persistent public URLs so clients can forward them to budget-holders without a login

features.oneLiner: 15 branded email event types with intelligent batching, anti-spam throttling, and morning digest delivery — never floods the client inbox

features.title: Client Email Capture
features.oneLiner: Lightweight email gate for shared-password portals — unlocks the full email marketing funnel for every free-tier client

features.title: AEO Page Review
features.oneLiner: AI generates specific, implementable content changes per page — actual replacement paragraphs, named citation targets, and exact restructuring instructions

features.title: Content Performance Tracking
features.oneLiner: Cross-references every published piece with GSC and GA4 data — proves content ROI with clicks, sessions, and conversion numbers

features.title: Revenue Analytics Dashboard
features.oneLiner: Admin dashboard showing total revenue, per-client breakdown, product type split, and 12-month trend chart from Stripe webhook data

features.title: "Time Saved" Metric
features.oneLiner: Tracks AI operations against human-equivalent time estimates — "We saved you 47 hours this month" is more compelling than "we used AI"

features.oneLiner: AI groups keywords into 5–10 business-relevant topic clusters and measures site coverage — surfaces the biggest topical gaps to fill first

features.oneLiner: Cross-references keyword map and GSC to find pages competing against each other, with canonical recommender suggesting the right fix for each case

features.oneLiner: Clients see the full content matrix with per-page status, can flag cells for changes, and download their complete content roadmap

features.title: ROI Dashboard
features.oneLiner: Shows organic traffic value (clicks × CPC), content ROI attribution, and growth vs previous period — puts a dollar figure on SEO results

features.oneLiner: New workspaces auto-provisioned with Growth tier access — trial badges, countdown timers, and upgrade prompts drive conversion passively

features.title: Client User Accounts
features.oneLiner: Individual logins per client team member with roles — marketing directors, content managers, and developers each have their own access

features.title: SERP Feature Targeting
features.oneLiner: Content gaps show Featured Snippet and People Also Ask opportunities with actionable content structuring advice per feature type

features.oneLiner: Tracks keyword strategy changes across generations — shows new gaps, resolved wins, and reassigned pages with green/red color coding

features.title: AI Copy Generation Pipeline
